title: justicia ilhensis
intro: Justicia ilhensis, also known as Ilheus Justicia, is a plant species in the Acanthaceae family native to Brazil. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Justicia ilhensis include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to help reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Justicia ilhensis are often made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
